incentive.statement: Organize every reconciled Karttunen causative and applicative relation against the closed Lesson 24-26 formation taxonomy while preserving typed prerequisites, competing analyses, evidence strength, and complete non-authority.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate Lesson 24-26 taxonomy, raw evidence reconciliation, source-versus-target classification, ambiguity retention, tabular delivery, and hostile invariants.

outcome: A sibling offline organizer assigns every one of the 276 causatives and 695 applicatives to at least one analytical Lesson 24-26 formation type. Lesson 24 source alternatives remain separate, numbered §25 subtypes include HUĀQUĪTIĀ under §25.2.1, and analytical classification never becomes a generation license.

responsibilities.statement: Define formation types from Canvas sections and distinguish productive families, nested source/procedure subtypes, comparison witnesses, participant transforms, and typed prerequisites.

actors.contribution: Supply the canonical Lesson 24-26 route vocabulary, exact overlap index, and typed prerequisite boundary.

responsibilities.statement: Reconcile the fixed-SHA raw inventory and attach an exhaustive numbered analytical type plus a separate exact, corroborated, compatible, ambiguous, source-compatible-only, or anomaly evidence status without creating runtime options.

actors.contribution: Emit grouped JSON, a Lesson 24 catalog, and one-row-per-relation TSVs with explicit evidence tiers and false authority flags.

responsibilities.statement: Prove exact inventory identity, source-versus-target separation, disjoint classification totals, known ambiguity counts, boundary round-trip, and authority neutrality.

actors.contribution: Enforce fixed totals and hostile fixtures in the organizer, then run alignment and readiness gates.

responsibilities.statement: Keep the current target, board, ignored generated artifacts, and shared-action evidence synchronized.

actors.contribution: Keep the organizer offline and prevent compatibility labels from becoming a second grammar lane.

retirements.removalEvidence: Lesson 24 stores current typed alternatives in sourceTypeCandidates while typeCandidates remains empty unless the generated target exactly equals Karttunen's recorded target; the fixed inventory has zero such matches.

All rows receive an analytical Canvas type, but weak right-edge shape is explicitly classificationOnly, generationLicensed=false, and authority=false. Canonical generation still requires typed class, valence, internal analysis, history, and lexical selection.
Lesson 26 remains separated into type-one iā, final-i/final-iā/consonant-a liā families, §26.8 overrides, o-ā/final-ō huiā families, and rare tiā.

evidence.result: All 276 causative rows are retained. No recorded target is an exact Lesson 24 output; 274 are later-causative-shaped and two remain target-unclassified. The canonical A/B intransitive replay finds a separate Lesson 24 alternative for 225 rows/189 unique sources, while every generated alternative differs from the recorded target.

The catalog has seven peer families: final-i replacement, final-i addition, homophonous final-a replacement, root-plus-ya replacement, long-vowel hua replacement, i/a-hui to o-ā, and o-hui to o-ā. §24.5 preferences/fused forms are nested subtypes; the pil-i-hui gap is explicit.

All 276 causatives receive an analytical type: 275 single and one ambiguous. Evidence remains separate: 89 exact, one exact §25.8 comparison, 51 nonactive-corroborated, 73 edit-compatible, and 62 raw-shape-only. HUĀQUĪTIĀ is explicitly §25.2.1; the two spelling anomalies receive nearest numbered types with visible anomaly flags.

All 695 applicatives receive at least one analytical type: 661 single and 34 ambiguous. Evidence remains separate: 452 current exact overlaps, 173 compatible non-authorizing hypotheses, 22 cross-lesson ambiguities, and 48 raw-shape-only assignments.

Every primary Lesson 25 and Lesson 26 boundary round-trips; all 276 recorded causatives are assigned across Lessons 24-25; no Lesson 24 source alternative is emitted as the recorded target; every candidate has generationLicensed=false and every authority flag is false.

The canonical suite passes 3393/3393 across 55 suites; runtime delivery remains 73/73 with one module entry; every Lesson 20, Lessons 20-22, Lessons 24-26, productive-rule, and Karttunen evidence audit passes; browser smoke reports one module script, zero classic scripts, typed authority true, and formula-string authority false.
